name: Wild Rice Almondine
directions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion, chives, shallots and green pepper and sauté until soft.
Stir in the rice and sauté 2 to 3 minutes more.
Add the almonds, water chestnuts and mushrooms.
Turn the mixture into a casserole dish.
Stir in the boiling chicken broth and season with salt and pepper, to taste.
Cover the casserole and bake in a 350 degree oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.

name: Perfect Crock Pot Rice
directions: Rub your slow cooker lightly with 1 tablespoon butter or margarine.
Pour in rice, water and salt.
Cover and cook on High 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
Note: Up to 4 cups raw rice may be prepared in slow cooker making 10 cups cooked.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions
College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
Rice and Whole Grains for Rice Cooker

name: Lazy Rice Cabbage Rolls
directions: Cook rice as you normally would.
Saute bacon and onion together until onion is soft and clear.
Add sauerkraut.
Stir.
Add rice; stir.
Turn into 2 quart casserole dish.
Cover.
Bake 45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Mint and Rice Green Salad
directions: Put all ingredients together in a bowl.
That is about it.

name: Trinidadian Peas and Rice
directions: Place all ingredients into rice cooker or large pot, turn on and follow your rice cooker's directions, or in a pot, bring to boil, simmer for 15 minutes until rice is almost cooked, cover and let sit for further 10 minutes.
Serve with sprinkle of coriander, and hot sauce to taste.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Black Beans and Yellow Rice
directions: Cook rice according to package directions; keep warm.
Meanwhile, drain beans, reserving 2 tablespoons liquid.
Combine beans, reserved liquid, lime juice, chili powder and cumin in a saucepan.
Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heated; stir in 1 tablespoon cilantro.
Serve beans over rice and sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon cilantro.
Garnish, if desired.

name: Aunt Helen's Rice Pilaf
directions: Melt butter over moderate heat.
Add birds nest angel hair pasta and stir constantly until nicely browned.
Be careful, as the pasta can burn VERY quickly.
Add rice to the pot and blend with pasta.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and garlic powder.
Bring to boil.
Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for about 20-25 minutes.
When cooked, stir and let set for about 5-10 minutes.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan

name: Wieners and Rice
directions: Make instant rice as directed on box (I add some soy sauce to water if desired).
While rice is cooking, cut up hot dogs, onion and celery and fry in butter or margarine.
Once rice is ready, add hot dog mixture to rice add some soy sauce if wanted.
This goes great with stir frys.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)
Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Rice Cooker Wild Rice
directions: Rub with butter or spray rice cooker pan with nonstick cooking spray.
Add water or stock, rice, and salt to taste.
Cover and cook about 40- 50 minutes, or until rice is fluffy.
Let stand 10 minutes more before serving.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Curried Rice Salad
directions: Cook rice as directed on box.
Cool.
Drain and chop artichoke hearts, reserving marinade.
Add curry powder and mayonnaise to marinade.
Add onions, chopped artichokes and black and stuffed olives to rice.
Pour marinade mixture over rice mixture and refrigerate overnight.
Serve chilled.
NOTE: Cooking time refers primarily to chilling time.
Cooking of rice-a-roni is covered in preparation time.

name: Kam Kreation Spanish Rice
directions: Place 2 cups white rice in medium saucepan and add 1 can of Rotel or any Mexican flavored tomatoes.  Cover and occasionally stir over med-low heat to prevent sticking.
Spoon and serve with Kam Kreations Southwest Chicken.
Super easy and Mmmmm good.

similar.name: Japanese Rice With Salted Peanuts and Scallions

name: BBQ Rice and Beef Roundup
directions: Saute rice mix with butter over medium heat until golden brown.
Slowly stir in 2-1/2 cups water, seasoning package and corn.
Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer 15-20 minutes or until rice is tender.
Stir in bbq sauce and ground beef.
Sprinkle with cheese.
Cover and let stand 3-5 minutes until cheese is melted.

similar.name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish
Porcupine Meatballs Baked in Chili Sauce
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Black Bean and Rice Salad
directions: COOK rice as directed on pkg.; place in large bowl. Cool slightly.
ADD remaining ingredients; mix lightly. Cover.
REFRIGERATE several hours or until chilled.
* Cook time includes chilling.

name: Curried Rice Egg Salad
directions: Cook rice according to package. Set aside to cool.
Slice 1 egg, reserving middle slices for garnish.
Chop all the eggs coarsely.
Stir yogurt and curry together.  Stir in rice, chopped eggs and broccoli.  Chill.
Prior to serving, cut each tomato into 6 sections and place on individual plates that are lined with lettuce or spinach leaves.
Top each evenly with egg mixture.
Garnish with egg slices.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Aussie Rice Salad
directions: Combine rice, vegetables and bacon bits.
Mix soy sauce, mayonnaise, allspice and cilantro.
Stir sauce into rice mixture and serve.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Baked Mushroom Rice
directions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
In a large bowl, stir together the white rice, cream of mushroom soup, and vegetable broth. You can use any kind of broth here.
Blend in the onion, mushrooms, parsley, oregano, melted butter, salt, and pepper. Transfer to a 2 quart baking dish, and cover with a lid or aluminum foil.
Bake for 45 to 50 minutes in the preheated oven.
If the rice is looking dry before it is tender, then pour in a little water and continue cooking until rice is tender.

similar.name: Savory Rice With Mushrooms (Johnny Cash's Mother's Recipe)
Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Rice Cakes
directions: Combine ingredients as listed.
Season.
Shape into patties.
Fry til golden and crispy.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)
Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Spanish Rice - Salsa Good!
directions: Combine all in a microwave safe bowl and cook for 15 mintues.
Or use that instant rice, combine all & follow directions on the box.

name: Wild Rice Soup
directions: Cover wild rice with water in a medium sized saucepan.
Simmer over low heat about 40 minutes until rice is barely tender, taking care not to overcook.
Drain and set aside.
Combine water and butter in a soup kettle.
Add grated potatoes and minced onions.
Reserving 1/4 cup milk, pour remaining milk into kettle.
Simmer on low stirring often to avoid scorching.
Add flour to remaining milk and stir into kettle until soup is creamy and smooth in texture.
Season with salt and pepper.
Stir in rice, parsley flakes, cheese and bacon.
Heat until cheese melts.

name: Rice Chantilly
directions: Combine cooked rice, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, sour cream, and red pepper.  Mix well.
Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 1 1/2-quart casserole.
Cover and bake at 350 F for 15-20 minutes.
Sprinkle top with remaining 1/4 cup cheese, and bake, uncovered, another 5 minutes.

similar.name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish

name: Red Beans and Rice Salad
directions: 1.In heavy sauce pan add water, thyme, rice and cayenne pepper.Bring to boil, cover and reduce heat to low. cook for 20 minutes or until rice is tender and water is absorbed.
2. Im a large bowl, mix rice with all other ingredients except salad dressing.
3. Add Italian salad dressing and stir gently. Serve warm or chilled.

name: Microwave Stuffed Green Bell Peppers
directions: Wash the peppers.  Remove tops, seeds, and any membranes.  Set upside down to drain.
Fry the hamburger, onion, garlic, and celery.  Drain well.  Stir in remaining ingredients reserving 1/4 cup of the tomato sauce.

Fill the peppers mounding the filling on top.  Place peppers in a casserole dish.  Cover and microwave 12 minutes.  Spread 1 tablespoons tomato sauce on each pepper and heat uncovered until tomato sauce is hot, about a minute.

similar.name: Porcupine Meatballs Baked in Chili Sauce
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)
Rice a Roni from Scratch in the Microwave

name: Rice Pilaf, Secret Ingredient
directions: Brown minute rice, maragarine and onion in pan.
Add chicken broth and mushrooms.
When rice is done;add grape nuts.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan

name: Curried Rice With Raisins
directions: Cook rice in 2 cups of water. Basmati rice is hard to ruin.  It cooks fast and is exactly 2 to one ratio water to rice.  1 cup uncooked Basmati will take 10 to 20 minutes to cook.
While rice is cooking melt butter in skillet.
Chop onion and saute in butter until translucent.
Add curry, raisins, salt and pepper, cover and simmer on low heat until rice is finished or about 5 minutes.
If rice pan is large enough, mix it around with a wooden spoon to losen then pour mixture in skillet over the top.  If not, transfer rice and curry mix to a larger bowl.
Mix well and enjoy.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Rice Pizza Crust
directions: Mix and press mixture evenly with a spoon into a greased 10 or 12 inch pizza pan.
Bake at 450 degrees F about 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
Remove from oven and prepare your favorite pizza sauce and toppings.
Bake about 10 minutes longer or until cheese melts, if using fresh grated cheese.

name: Tangy Hawaiian Rice
directions: Cook rice in chicken stock until stock is absorbed.  Brown pineapple and ham in butter in 1 1/2 quart casserole.  Stir in rice and season, to taste, with salt and pepper.
Add almonds, stir well and bake for 15 minutes at 350 degree oven.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Palpettoni
directions: Preheat oven to 375ºF.
Cook bacon until crisp, then remove from pan, drain on paper towels and crumble. Set aside.
Cook rice as directed on package until tender and drain if necessary. Set aside.
In large bowl, combined cooked and crumbled bacon, ground beef, egg yolk and pepper and mix gently.
On waxed paper, divide beef mixture into 4 4x6" rectangles, patting gently to form into shape.
In small bowl, combine cooked rice with onion dip.
Divide rice mixture over ground beef rectangles, spreading evenly.
Roll up the rectangles, starting with 4" side, to enclose rice mixture, using waxed paper to help roll (be sure to not roll the waxed paper into the meatloaves!).
Place rolls in a 10" baking dish.
Pour tomato sauce over each roll, then top with cheeses and oregano.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until beef is thoroughly cooked and rolls are browned.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan
Porcupine Meatballs Baked in Chili Sauce

name: Franco Italiano Rice With Pork
directions: Add all ingredients to rice cooker. Stir to mix.(Do not add optional ingredient).
Set microwave on 70% power for 12  minutes.
(My microwave is very high power so if it is under 1200 watts cook at least 14 minutes above.
Take out and stir lightly so the meat will be distributed.(This is the time if you want to add blanched minced green pepper).
Set microwave 70% power for 10 minutes.
(My microwave is very high power so if it is under 1200 watts cook at least 12 minutes).
Take out, let set for 10 minutes covered.
Place in serving dish.
Dot with margarine if you wish. No gravy needed. Very flavorable.
Note: You can use dry Lipton Onion Soup Mix but do not use the whole package. It will be too salty in combination with the italian salad dressing. Use a little more water also.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Coconut Rice
directions: Melt butter in a heated skillet on med high heat.
Add sea salt, cumin and basamati rice. Brown for 4 - 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and water. Stir.
After cooking 1 minute on high heat, reduce heat to simmer. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
Turn off heat Let sit for 5 minutes and serve.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions
Rice and Whole Grains for Rice Cooker

name: Creamy Fast Rice
directions: Empty one can of cream of mushroom soup into a pot.
Fill empty can with milk or water, or combination of both and add to pot.
Fill empty can with rice.
Cook on medium until rice is cooked.
Let sit and the sauce will thicken!

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)

name: Cheesy Tomato Rice Soup
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine water & condensed soup, frozen peas & hotdog pieces. (You can cook the hotdogs in the microwave to save time). Heat over medium-low heat until peas are tender (about 10 minutes). Remove from heat.  Stir in mozarella cheese until melted. Pepper to taste.
Add a dollop of salsa & sour cream for a spicier flavor.
Please note that, if there are left-overs, the rice will absorb most of the soup, so you will have to add more water.
Bon appetit!

similar.name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish

name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions
directions: mix together 3/4 or 1 cup of uncooked white rice with 1 cup orange juice and 1 cup water.
put in a microwave safe bowl.
cover with plastic wrap, leaving a corner turned back to vent.
microwave on high for 5 minutes 20 minutes at 1/2 power.
take the rice out, uncover carefully and fluff with a fork.
add in peas and onions and margarine, ( more or less according to taste).
if you use frozen peas and onions you need to heat again for about 3 min, covered so the peas don't explode all over the microwave. If you use canned, the heat from the rice will do the trick.
serve and take all compliments that come your way.

name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan
directions: Melt butter in a samll saucepan over medium high heat.
Add shallots and garlic; saute about 1 minute.
Stir in rice; saute about 1 minute.
Stir in broth and wine; bring to a boil.
Cover and reduce heat.
Simmer 15 minutes.
Remove from heat; stir in cheese, parsley, pepper and salt.

name: Rice Pilaf
directions: Brown vermicelli in butter and minced garlic.
Add dry rice and stir.
Pour 4 cups of boiling water mixed with the bouillon cubes over mixture.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Add parsley.
Cover and cook on lowest heat for 30 minutes.
Turn off heat and leave covered for an additional 30 minutes.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Wild Rice Salad
directions: Combine all dressing ingredients in lidded jar and shake well.  Refrigerate until ready to use.
In large saucepan, heat all water (2 quarts plus 1 cup) and rice to boiling.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
Drain excess liquid from rice.
Drain artichoke hearts, reserving marinade.
Halve artichoke hearts and add to rice with peas, peppers, green onions, tomatoes, reserved marinade and half the dressing.
Toss again and taste.
Add some of remaining dressing, if desired.
Sprinkle with almonds and served.

name: Spiced Prawns With Tomatoes
directions: Heat the oil and add the onion slices, frying gently until soft and golden. Add all spices and garlic and heat through a few minutes.

Now add prawns, stirring around to coat evenly with spice mixture. Add the tomatoes and some S+P, bringing to a simmer and cooking 20-25 minutes, uncovered, which will rake off a lot of water and reduce the tomato to a sauce.
Serve with rice or pasta.

similar.name: Sarasota's Fresh Seared Tilapia With Lemon Cream

name: Spanish Rice
ingredients: sazon goya con culantro y achiote
directions: Fry rice in oil until it turns a golden tan (careful not to burn). Add tomatoes, onion, and all seasonings.
Add 2 cups hot water, until water is about an inch above the rice.
Cover tightly and steam for about 10 minutes or until rice is tender.(More water may be added if needed).

name: Quick Veggie Rice
directions: Cook the Minute Rice according to
instructions.
Drain the rice and place it in a large skillet or pot (I just put it back in the pan I cooked it in.).

Add the soup mix and as much of the chicken broth(I used half broth and half water and only used half the can) as you need to absorb the soup mix and keep the rice from sticking. Stir together and heat through and through, cooking until the broth is absorbed.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Belinda's Mexican Rice
directions: Sauté the rice in the oil for a couple of minutes, until it starts to get lightly browned.
Add broth, salsa, cumin, and garlic salt; bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until done.

name: Curried Fruit and Rice Salad
directions: Cook rice according to directions in lightly salted water.
Allow the rice to cool once it has completed cooking.
In a large bowl combine all other ingredients with the rice and stir well.
Chill for several hours or overnight before serving to allow flavors to meld.

name: Black Eyed Pea Rice Pilaf
directions: In a sauté pan, cook the peppers, garlic and oil.
Add all herbs, rice and chicken stock to pan. Cook the rice through, should take about 10 minutes until the rice softens and the stock reduces.
Add the peas and cook five more minutes. Serve on a platter.

name: Basic Fried Rice
directions: In a small bowl, mix the soy sauce, sesame oil, and rice. Set aside.
In a large skillet or wok heat oil over medium-high heat, heat vegetable oil and add onion. Cook until just tender.
Move onions off to the sides of pan to form a circle and pour egg in middle. Begin scrambling the egg, and when they begin to solidify, add the rice mixture and cook 1-2 minutes.
Add Peas, carrots, and bean sprouts (if using). Toss to combine ingredients and heat through. Serve immediately with garnish of freshly chopped green onions.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Basic Rice Pilaf
directions: Melt butter in saucepan and cook onion over medium heat until golden. Stir in rice and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper. Stir in chicken stock and bring to a boil.
Cover and turn heat down to low. Simmer gently for 20 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork and stir in parsley.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan

name: Tarragon Rice Pilaf
directions: Melt butter in saucepan and cook onion over medium heat until golden. Stir in rice and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper. Stir in chicken stock and bring to a boil. Cover and turn heat down to low. Simmer gently for 15 minutes.
Keep rice covered and remove from heat after it has been simmering for the 15 minutes. Let sit for 5 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork and stir in parsley and tarragon. Serve.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
directions: bring 3/4 cup water to a boil in large nonstick skillet, add frozen carrot blend and cook for 5 minutes, then drain off the water.
Add tikka masala, chicken, and water cook until heated through.
While that is cooking make your 5 min rice.
Serve sauce over the rice and sprinkle with fresh cilantro.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Chicken Rice for Christmas
directions: wash rice.
boil water and mix with butter, chicken boulivon.
add watery butter mix to rice, in rice cooker.
add in peppers.
press down on cook button, and wait for rice.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Rice Roni Summer Salad
directions: Cook rice roni according to directions on the box, put in refrigerator and let cool completely (I do overnight).
In a bowl mix mayo, artichoke hearts, juice and curry powder.
Mix with the rice, refrigerate to cool again (about an hour).

name: Texas Shrimp and Rice Salad
directions: Bring water to boil in large pot; add shrimp and return to boil.
Reduce heat and simmer 3-5 minutes.
Drain shrimp well and rinse with cold water. Cool shrimp; peel and devein.
Combine shrimp, rice, beans, olives and onions; toss well.
Combine salad dressing with seasonings; mix well.
Pour over rice mix and chill.
Serve over salad greens.

name: Retta's Spanish Rice
directions: In a 3 quart saucepan, add all ingredients except rice and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally to combine.
Lower heat, add rice and cover for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Uncover and cook to desired consistency.

name: Parmesan Risotto ....to Die For!
directions: In 2L saucepan, cook garlic and shallot in olive oil over low heat until tender.
Add rice, wine, and 1/2 cup chicken stock. If not using wine, use extra 1/4 cup chicken stock.
Simmer (small bubbles, not boiling) for 15-20 minutes, adding 1/2 cup chicken stock as rice absorbs liquid.
When rice is al dente, remove from heat. There should still be thick liquid in the pot - this will be absorbed as it cools. Add parmesan and a little bit of freshly ground pepper.
Enjoy! Still tastes yummy if refrigerated and reheated.

similar.name: Rice Pilaf With Shallots and Parmesan

name: "peachy" Curried Rice Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients and refrigerate for 1-2 hours for flavours to blend.
If desired, mayo may be thinned with a little milk.

name: Rice a Roni from Scratch in the Microwave
directions: Place rice, orzo (or other pasta) and margarine in a 2 quart heavy glass bowl.  Microwave on high 3 1/2 - 4 minutes stirring after every minute (more often toward the end if you use pasta other than orzo) or until pasta is golden brown.
Stir in broth (or bouillon) and spices.
Microwave 12 minutes on high.
Let sit 3 minutes in microwave.
Fluff with fork and serve.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)
College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)

name: Chicken Rice Vermicelli Soup
directions: In large saucepan, bring water, celery and carrots to a boil.
Stir in cubed chicken, rice/vermicelli mix and bouillon.
Return to a boil then reduce heat, cover and simmer 15-20 minutes or til rice is tender.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Cold Rice Salad
directions: Make rice according to package directions, OMITTING butter.  Let cool completly.
Add chopped artichoke hearts, green onions, pimento olives and bell pepper.
Make dressing by mixing mayonnaise, reserved marinade and curry powder.
Fold into rice mixture and chill completly before serving.

name: Yellow Rice Casserole
directions: Cook rice to package directions.
Blend soup, sour cream, and butter.
Combine all ingredients, except cheese, in 7 x 11 dish.  Bake at 350 for 25 minutes until hot throughout.
Top with cheese and bake 5 additional minutes, until melted.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Greek Rice Salad
directions: Cook rice according to package directions.
add lemon Pepper, oregano, garlic and oil to hot rice and stir to combine.
Remove from pot and into a mixing bowl.
refrigerate 20-30 minutes.
add cucumber, olives and Feta.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Porcupine Meatballs Baked in Chili Sauce
directions: Combine tomato juice, chili powder, allspice, celery seed, Worcestershire sauce, and brown sugar in a medium saucepan.
Mix well and simmer for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine the rest of the ingredients, mix well, and form 1/4 cup of the meat mixer into meatballs ( or I use a large cookie scoop) and place them in a 9 x 13 baking dish.
Pour the sauce over the top of the meatballs, cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

similar.name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish

name: Cheesy Wild Rice Casserole
directions: In a 2 qt casserole dish, combine rice mix and seasoning packet with mushrooms.
In a medium saucepan, combine water, spinach, onion, butter, mustard, and nutmeg.
Bring to boiling; remove from heat.
Stir; pour over rice mixture.
Stir in cream cheese.
Bake, covered in a 375 degree oven for 20 minutes.
Stir mixture.
Cover;bake 15-20 minutes more or until rice is tender.
Stir again.
Let stand 5 minutes before serving.

name: Mushroom Rice
directions: Melt butter in a saucepan. When foaming subsides, add onion and green pepper. Saute until limp and onion is translucent.
Drain liquid from mushroom can into 2-cup measure. Add water to bring volume up to 2 cups. Add mushrooms to saucepan and saute 1 minute.
Add rice and liquid. Cover tightly and cook 30 min or until rice is tender.

similar.name: Savory Rice With Mushrooms (Johnny Cash's Mother's Recipe)
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Wild Rice Salad
directions: rinse wild rice with hot water. Drain.
in pan combine chicken broth with two additional cups of water.
simmer for 30 to 40 min until all water is absorbed. cool.
Broccoli : chop small.
Carrot: slice thin rounds.
Red bell pepper: cut into strips.
onion: dice.
walnuts: light chop.
mushrooms: large dice.
in mixing bowl mix all ingredients except dressing.
in small bowl mix dressing ingredients until smooth. pour over salad.
mix and refrigerate.

similar.name: Wild Rice, Sauteed Apples & Onion With Fresh Sage

name: Rice Pilaf
directions: Heat olive oil in large pot.
Add rice and stir.
Fry for 5-7 minutes.
Add remaining ingredients, stir and heat to boil.
Cover and keep on low heat for 1 hour, stirring once or twice.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Savory Rice With Mushrooms (Johnny Cash's Mother's Recipe)
directions: Melt butter and cook minced onion in it.
Add rice; brown lightly.
Combine other ingredients with rice mixture and bring to boil.
Cover; reduce heat and steam until liquid is absorbed.
If rice is not done, add more water sparingly.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Simple Rice Cooker Risotto
directions: Place butter in rice cooker and turn on. When melted, add onion and saute 3-4 min until soft. Add rice and saute 2-3 min until coated with butter and rice has turned milky-white. Add remaining ingredients except cheese. Cover and cook until rice cooker turns off. Stir in cheese before serving.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Old Faithful
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Drain tomatoes, reserving enough of the liquid to bring the broth to 2 cups.
Add rice, soup mix and broth to bottom of 12x12 baking dish, stir to combine and evenly distribute in the baking dish.
Place pork chops on top of rice mixture.
Top each pork chop with a ring of onion and a ring of green pepper.  Fill each ring with diced tomatoes.
Cover and bake for 65-70 minutes or until meat is cooked through and liquid absorbed into the rice.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Belizean " Dirty Rice "
directions: Put all ingredients into a saucepan.
Bring to a boil and simmer until rice is cooked and liquid is gone.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)

name: Broccoli and Rice Casserole
directions: Saute celery and onion in a small amount of butter.
Cook rice as directed.
Cook broccoli.
Mix all ingredients and pour into a 9" baking dish.
Sprinkle with paprika.
Bake at 350 for 20 to 25 minutes or until heated.

similar.name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish

name: Veal Supreme
directions: Saute onions and celery.
Put onions and celery in a bowl, set aside.
Brown meat.
Add all ingredients together, rice and water last.
Bake uncovered in 350 degree oven for 1 1/2 hours.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Too Easy Vegetable Beef Hot Dish
directions: Pre-heat oven to 350.
Pour can of soup into 1.5 qt casserole dish; add rice & mix.
Mix in croutons.
Pour water over everything, mix again.
Add in cheese.
Bake for 15 minutes.

name: Creamy Rice
directions: Preheat the oven to 350°.
Saute the onion in the butter until brown.
Transfer the onion and butter to a baking dish.
Add the mushroom soup mixed with the water and the consomme.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to blend.  Cover the baking dish and bake for 1 hours.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Fried Rice from the Far East
directions: Blend sugar and soy sauce.  Set aside.
Heat butter in small skillet, add egg and cook as for omelettes.  Remove from heat.  Cut in 1/2 inch strips.  Set aside.
Heat oil in wok or large skillet.
Add garlic, onion and pepper.  Stir-fry fro 1 minute longer.
Add rice, chicken andshrimp.  Stir-fry for 3-4 minute longer.
Stir in soy sauce mixture andheat.  Garnish with egg strips.  Serve at once.

similar.name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Caribbean Coconut Rice and Beans
directions: Combine coconut milk, bay leaf (or garlic) if you're using it, and rice.  Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.  Add some salt, lower heat to low and cover.  Cook for 10 minutes.  Stir occasionally to ensure it doesn't scorch.

Uncover.  Cook, stirring over low heat, until rice is tender and mixture is creamy, about 15 minutes.  At about the 10-minute mark, stir in beans.  If liquid evaporates before rice is done, stir in water (about 1/2 cup at a time), and cook until done.

name: Quick Jamaican Rice and Peas
directions: Pour the rice in the rice cooker.

Combine the water, green pigeon peas with coconut milk, salt, pepper, thyme, garlic and scallions.  Pour over the rice.  Rice should be completely covered with water, and at least an inch above it if this recipe is like others I have cooked.

Place Scotch bonnet in the pot   (Do not cut it up if you don't want a lot of heat.)  Turn on the rice cooker.  Serve when finished.  Don't  keep the rice cooker on warm as it will burn the bottom of the rice.

name: Cuban Black Beans and Rice (Quick)
directions: Heat oven to 350°F.
Mix all ingredients except rice in a 2 qt casserole.
Bake uncovered about 50 minutes, stirring occasionally, until hot and bubbly.
Serve over rice.

name: Hawaiian Rice
directions: 1. Pour syrup from the can into a sauce pan.  Bring to a boil for approximately five minutes.
2. Lower heat and stir in brown sugar untill it disolves completely.  Add ginger and soy and allow to sit on very low heat to keep warm.

3. On a grill place pinapple rings and cook for about four minutes on one side and one minute on the other side. ( you can broil them in the oven, but you should baste the rings with the sauce before broiling to help pinapple turn golden brown) place pinapple rings on top of rice, pour sauce over rice.
I highly recommend adding grilled scallops or shrimp to this dish. enjoy.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Japanese Rice With Salted Peanuts and Scallions
directions: Lightly rinse the rice in a sieve until all the rice is wet. Put it in a 6-cup saucepan with 2 cups water and let it soak for 30 minutes.
Crush the peanuts lightly to the size of whole peppercorns. This is easy to do by pressing a small, heavy saucepan on the peanuts with a rocking motion.

Stir the rice well and place the saucepan over high heat. Let the rice come to a boil. Stir it again and turn the heat down as low as possible. Cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid and let simmer for 11 minutes. Move the rice off the heat and let it sit, covered for 5 minutes.
Transfer the rice to a bowl, stir well, and let cool for 10 minutes. Fold in the peanuts, scallions, oil, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Shape the rice in a mold.
For assembly:.
Choose a simple, colorful plate that contrasts in both shape and color with the rice.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East

name: Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)
directions: In a large skillet combine Veggies, Onion, Celery, 1 tablespoon Chicken Base and Butter. Let simmer for about 10 minutes.
In a seperate pot prepare rice as directed after water comes to a boil, add the remaining Chicken Base.
When Rice is done add it to the skillet along with the Chicken Drippings, Let simmer all together for about 15 minutes
Serve immediatley.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East

name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
directions: Spray rice bowl with Pam (nonstick coating spray).
Add water to rice bowl.
Add instant rice.
Push button down to cook.
When button pops up let rice sit for 5 minutes.
Serve.

name: Brown Rice
directions: Mix the soups and Rice and pour into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
Drop pats of butter on top of the soup and rice.
Bake covered at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Wild Rice, Sauteed Apples & Onion With Fresh Sage
directions: Rice  --  Cook the rice according to directions.  I like to cook in chicken broth for extra flavor, but by all means, water will work just fine.

Note: If entertaining, I replace 1/2 cup of the chicken broth with white wine to even give the dish more flavor, but for every day I don't.  Also if you have kids you may or may not want to. That is up to you.  The wine adds a great flavor to the dish however.

Apples and Onions  --  as the rice cooks which will take about 20-30 minutes heat up a small skillet on medium heat and melt the butter.  Saute the onions and apples on medium for 5 minutes until soft but not over cooked.  Add in the apple jelly, sage, salt and pepper.
Mix  --  When the rice is done, combine the rice with the apple mixture and it is ready to enjoy. If you want, garnish with a teaspoon of butter to mix in and even make the dish richer in flavor.

name: Red Hot Rice
directions: Melt the butter in a heavy 3 litre saucepan over moderate heat. Add the onion, and cook, uncovered, for 5 minutes, or until soft.

Stir in the rice, red pepper, chilli powder, origanum, tomato juice and tomato puree, then add the water and salt.   Stir once, cover and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender, and the liquid has been absorbed.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Fish Meal in One
directions: Cook the rice as desired.
while Rice is cooking Cut 4 pieces of Aluminum Foil (enough to wrap the fish, Rice & Vegetable).
Place 1 piece of fillet on each piece of the foil.
Coat the fillets with Garlic & herbs.
Place equally divided rice on top of the fish pieces.
Top with Thinly slices or finely chopped Vegetables
Wrap the meal securing well.
Bake at 180 for 20 - 30 minutes checking once at 15 minutes.
Fish is ready when white all the way through and the veggies are cooked.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: My Microwave Risotto
directions: Microwave bacon, onion and butter for 3-5 minutes.
Add the rice and vegetables to the onion and bacon mix.
Dissolve the stock cubes in the water and add to the mix. Stir.
Cover and cook 15-20 minutes on HIGH.4. Leave to stand in the microwave for 5 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Rice a Roni from Scratch in the Microwave
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Sarasota's Fresh Seared Tilapia With Lemon Cream
directions: Optional Rice  --  If you are planning to make the rice, start now. Any rice - any method you want. Once it is finished, move to the back burner and stir in the butter, lemon juice, scallions, salt and pepper and mix well. Keep it covered while you make the sauce and fish. As the rice was cooking, start the sauce.

Sauce  --  To a small sauce pot, add the cream, flour, thyme, and lemon zest and bring to medium heat.  Let the cream simmer 10 minutes. It will naturally reduce. Once the sauce is done. Remove from the heat and add the lemon juice, salt, pepper and parsley.

Fish  --  Make sure your fillets are not icy cold. Remove from the refrigerator to let them warm up a bit before cooking them. Season each fillet well with salt and pepper on both sides. Sprinkle each side of the fish lightly with flour. I just use my small strainer which works perfect, but you can also just sprinkle it on with your hand. It is a light dusting is all.

Cook  --  In a large saute pan, bring the pan up to medium high heat and add the butter and olive oil. Add the fish and the lemon slices. The lemon slices can cook right next to the fish. Cook the fish until golden brown on the first side and then flip.The fish will probably only take 3-4 minutes per side.  Don't over cook.

Serve  --  Fluff up the rice that is finished on the back burner. Serve 3/4-1 cup of rice on each plate, top with a fish fillet and 2 lemon slices, and drizzle with the lemon cream sauce. A light easy recipe.  ENJOY!

similar.name: Wild Rice, Sauteed Apples & Onion With Fresh Sage

name: Onion Rice
directions: Heat the oil in a wok or skillet. Add the mustard seeds and chilis and when it sputters, add the sliced onions.  Saute until the onions are golden. Add the rice and salt and pepper to taste. Mix well and heat the rice.  Remove from the stove and stir in the lime juice.  Sprinkle with the cilantro and serve.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Rice and Whole Grains for Rice Cooker
directions: In the morning, measure grains and lentils into rice cooker, adding water to cover.  Vary whole grains as desired, to total 1/2 cup.  Allow to soak all day.  (The soaking will allow the whole grains to cook tender in the normal rice cooker cycle).

About 45 minutes before dinner, drain off the soaking water (this is only necessary if your are using beans--to throw most of the gas-producing stuff down the drain). Add water to 3/4-inch above the surface of the grain.  Measure by placing the tip of your index finger on the surface of the rice--water should be up to the first knuckle.
Sprinkle in salt if desired. Start the rice cooker.  It will be ready by dinner time.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions

name: Simple Baked Wild Rice
directions: Put ingredients into 2+ qt covered baking dish, cover, and bake 1.5 - 1.75 hours at 350.  Check/fluff with fork after 1 hour.
Can also add canned drained mushrooms, cooked onions while baking.
After baking complete can sprinkle cheese shreds over rice to melt and make a nice presentation for serving, if desired.

name: Honeyed Wild Rice
directions: Bring a large saucepan of water to boil. Add rice and simmer, stirring occasionally for 25 minutes or until tender.
Drain.
Heat butter in small frying pan.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until soft but not brown.
Add rice, honey and soy sauce, tossing until coated.

similar.name: Fried Rice from the Far East
Chicken Vegetable Rice (Like Rice a Roni)

name: Mince & Rice
directions: Put the rice onto boil & let cook.
Heat pan & spray lighly with cooking oil.
Cook mince throughly with he garlic.
Once mince is cooked, add the soup & mix through.
Drain the rice thoroughly.
Place a bed of rice on plate & top with mince & sauce mix.
You can add mixed diced vegies or serve with steamed veg like broccoli, beans, cauliflower & carrots.

similar.name: Orange Rice With Peas and Pearl Onions
College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)

name: The Fastest Rice Recipe (In the World!)
directions: Heat oil in saucepan on high heat.
Dump rice in heat and stir to coat kernels thoroughly.
Let oil "fry" rice lightly, stir occasionally so it doesn't burn.

When rice starts to stick to the bottom, pour enough water to cover rice by about 3/4 inch. Stir so rice is evenly coated and bottom of pot is scrapped. Let rice boil on high heat until the water boils down.
When water seems very low, turn heat down to low and place lid on pot.
Cook for 4-5 more minutes, then fluff with a fork and add salt to taste.
It is very important that you do not stir the rice while it is boiling down. If you stir it, it will burn.

I cook my rice this way every time. I was skeptical at first but it makes fast, delicious, and perfectly fluffy rice. I will never go back to boil it away for 40 minutes. One of the benefits of this recipe is that you don't need to measure everything, I often just scoop out a mass of rice and then fill the pot with enough water to cover and it works every time. No more measuring!
*Sometimes I put raisins in the water to cook into the rice when I am using it for curry dishes.

similar.name: College Instant Rice (In a Rice Cooker)
